ModMetaData.name: Vanilla Factions Expanded - Classical - No Auto Research
ModMetaData.description:
Adds an in-game toggle for the automatic research unlocks granted by the Eastern Republic senators' Profectus perk.
Once the perk is unlocked, a flask toggle appears in the bottom-right play settings. Click it to switch auto research on or off.
The same on/off control is also in Mod Settings, along with an option to hide the in-game toggle. Auto research is on by default, so nothing changes until you turn it off.
ModMetaData.author: Machado
